title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 141.660 - Costs, how taxed
text:
141.660.  Costs, how taxed. — No costs shall be taxed against the collector or any intervening taxing authority; otherwise costs shall be taxed in the manner that costs are ordinarily taxed, except as otherwise provided in sections 141.210 to 141.810.
(L. 1943 p. 1029 § 29)
